tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Primitive Coverage Audit
trigger_conditions: Use before building or promoting additional WBS09 create/configure/repair action primitives to identify manifest primitive coverage and not-ready gaps.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT, DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR, Node.js, and wbs09_airtable_native_views_manifest.json. No Airtable token or browser session required.
output_contract: Writes dcoir_wbs09_primitive_coverage_audit_* under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with JSON and Markdown reports. Package with New-DcoirChatGPTFriendlyZip.ps1.
safety_preconditions: Read-only. Does not call Airtable API, open a browser, mutate views, edit files, or run broad rollout.
notes: Proposed read-only planning/audit tool. Promote only after syntax validation and first local audit evidence.
